items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q1 2026 NAV rises to $1.50/share on oil price gains at Morgan E&P
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q1 2026 NAV per share increased to $1.50 from $1.19, driven by higher crude oil prices boosting the fair value of Morgan E&P.

items.title: 8-K — Auditor Changes

8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q4 2025 NAV falls to $1.19/share as Morgan E&P oil outlook weakens
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q4 2025 NAV per share declined to $1.19 from $1.90, driven by a lower oil forward price curve and elimination of a portion of Morgan E&P's planned acreage.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q3 2025 NAV declines to $1.90/share on General Enterprise Ventures loss
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q3 2025 NAV per share fell to $1.90 from $2.51, primarily due to a decrease in fair value of its holding in General Enterprise Ventures.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q2 2025 NAV essentially flat at $2.51/share
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q2 2025 NAV per share decreased slightly to $2.51 from $2.52, with fair value of General Enterprise Ventures increasing modestly during the quarter.

items.headline_ai: Equus receives NYSE non-compliance notice for stock price below $1.00

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q1 2025 NAV rises to $2.52/share on Morgan E&P oil price gains
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q1 2025 NAV per share increased to $2.52 from $2.17, driven by a higher crude oil forward price curve boosting the fair value of Morgan E&P.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q4 2024 NAV falls to $2.17/share as oil price curve weakens
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q4 2024 NAV per share declined to $2.17 from $2.96, primarily due to a lower forward oil price curve reducing the fair value of Morgan E&P.

items.headline_ai: Equus appoints Fraser Atkinson chairman, John May as independent director
items.snippet: Equus Total Return appoints Fraser Atkinson as independent chairman and John J. May, a UK chartered accountant with 50+ years of experience, as an independent director.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q3 2024 NAV falls to $2.96/share as Morgan E&P oil prices drop 17.6%
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q3 2024 NAV per share declined to $2.96 from $3.66, driven by a 17.6% decrease in oil prices reducing the fair value of Morgan E&P.

items.title: 8-K — Listing / Delisting / Compliance

items.headline_ai: Equus Q2 2024 NAV rises to $3.66/share as Morgan E&P expands acreage
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q2 2024 NAV per share increased to $3.66 from $3.38, driven by Morgan E&P's acquisition of additional Bakken acreage and rising oil prices.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote
8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q1 2024 NAV dips to $3.38/share as Morgan E&P debt rises
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q1 2024 NAV per share declined to $3.38 from $3.55, as Morgan E&P's debt increased by $2.2M and fair value decreased by $1.35M.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q4 2023 NAV rises to $3.55/share, Morgan E&P adds $7.6M in value
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q4 2023 NAV per share increased to $3.55 from $3.49, with Morgan E&P contributing a $7.6M increase in fair value following well completions.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Morgan E&P completes two Bakken wells, sells working interest for $5.6M
items.snippet: Equus subsidiary Morgan E&P completes two horizontal wells in North Dakota's Bakken/Three Forks formation and sells wellbore working interest for $5.6M, with gross production over

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q3 2023 NAV rises to $3.49/share, Morgan E&P begins drilling
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q3 2023 NAV per share increased to $3.49 from $2.96, with Morgan E&P commencing drilling on two new Bakken/Three Forks wells.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q2 2023 NAV rises to $2.96/share after Morgan E&P acquires 4,747 Bakken acres
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q2 2023 NAV per share increased to $2.96 from $2.52, driven by Morgan E&P's acquisition of 4,747 Bakken/Three Forks net acres in North Dakota.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus reports results of its 2023 annual stockholder meeting
items.snippet: Equus Total Return announced the results of its annual meeting of stockholders held May 25, 2023.

items.title: 8-K — Material Definitive Agreement · Acquisition or Disposition · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Morgan E&P closes acquisition of 4,747 Bakken acres from Pro Energy
items.snippet: Equus subsidiary Morgan E&P closes a Purchase and Sale Agreement with Pro Energy I for 4,747.52 net acres in the Bakken/Three Forks formation, requiring a minimum of six wells with

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus forms Morgan E&P oil and gas subsidiary focused on Bakken development
items.snippet: Equus Total Return forms Morgan E&P, LLC as a new wholly-owned subsidiary to acquire, develop and operate oil and gas assets primarily in the Bakken area of North Dakota.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q1 2023 NAV dips to $2.52/share on professional fee increases
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q1 2023 NAV per share declined to $2.52 from $2.61, due to increased professional fees and due diligence expenses related to potential transactions.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q4 2022 NAV dips to $2.61/share as Equus Energy fair value rises modestly
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q4 2022 NAV per share declined slightly to $2.61 from $2.68, while the fair value of Equus Energy LLC increased from $13M to $15.65M during the year.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q3 2022 NAV dips to $2.68/share, portfolio fair values flat
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q3 2022 NAV per share declined to $2.68 from $2.75; portfolio investments held flat while professional fees and due diligence expenses reduced net assets.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus shareholders authorize withdrawal of its BDC election
items.snippet: Equus Total Return shareholders authorized the company to withdraw its BDC election, supporting an intended transformative transaction.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q2 2022 NAV slips to $2.75/share, Equus Energy rises modestly
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q2 2022 NAV per share edged down to $2.75 from $2.77, with Equus Energy fair value increasing from $15.0M to $15.5M during the quarter.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus reports results of its 2022 annual shareholder meeting
items.snippet: Equus Total Return announced the results of its annual meeting of stockholders held June 9, 2022.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q1 2022 NAV rises to $2.77/share as Equus Energy gains on oil prices
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q1 2022 NAV per share increased to $2.77 from $2.69, driven by a fair value gain in Equus Energy from $13.0M to $15.0M on higher oil prices.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q4 2021 NAV rises to $2.69 as Equus Energy doubles in value
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q4 2021 NAV per share rose to $2.69; Equus Energy fair value increased from $7.0M to $13.0M during full year 2021 on Permian Basin oil price recovery.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q3 2021 NAV rises to $2.68/share as Equus Energy gains on oil prices
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q3 2021 NAV per share increased to $2.68 from $2.57, driven by a fair value gain in Equus Energy from $10.25M to $12.0M on rising oil prices.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote · Other Events
items.headline_ai: Equus shareholders authorize withdrawal of its BDC election
items.snippet: Equus Total Return shareholders holding 55.6% authorized the company to withdraw its BDC election to pursue a transformative transaction.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q2 2021 NAV rises to $2.57/share as Equus Energy gains on oil prices
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q2 2021 NAV per share increased to $2.57 from $2.52, driven by a fair value increase in Equus Energy from $8.5M to $10.25M on crude price gains.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus reports results of its 2021 annual shareholder meeting
items.snippet: Equus Total Return announced the results of its annual meeting of stockholders held May 27, 2021.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q1 2021 NAV rises to $2.52/share as Equus Energy gains on oil recovery
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q1 2021 NAV per share increased to $2.52 from $2.50, driven by Equus Energy fair value rising from $7.0M to $8.5M on crude and natural gas price increases.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q4 2020 NAV falls to $2.50/share despite Equus Energy gain, PalletOne exits
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q4 2020 NAV per share declined to $2.50 from $2.77, as $24M in portfolio liquidations including PalletOne offset an Equus Energy fair value gain.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus shareholders authorize BDC election withdrawal for potential transformation
items.snippet: Equus Total Return shareholders authorize the board to withdraw the BDC election and increase authorized shares, preparing the company for a potential strategic transformation into

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus receives initial $18.2M payment from PalletOne sale to UFP Industries
items.snippet: Equus Total Return receives an initial payment of $18.2M from UFP Industries' acquisition of PalletOne for approximately $232M; remaining proceeds expected in Q2 2021.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus closes sale of PalletOne stake as UFP Industries acquires company for $232M
items.snippet: UFP Industries closes its acquisition of PalletOne for approximately $232M; Equus Total Return had been a shareholder since 2001.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus announces pending PalletOne sale to UFP Industries for $232M
items.snippet: UFP Industries approves acquisition of PalletOne for approximately $232M; the transaction is expected to close December 28, 2020.

items.title: 8-K — Officer / Director Departure or Appointment
8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q3 2020 NAV falls to $2.77/share as PalletOne value declines
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q3 2020 NAV per share declined to $2.77 from $3.07, primarily due to a decrease in the fair value of PalletOne amid COVID-19 disruptions.

items.title: 8-K — Officer / Director Departure or Appointment
8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q2 2020 NAV rises to $3.07/share as PalletOne recovers
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q2 2020 NAV per share increased to $3.07 from $2.88, driven by a fair value increase in PalletOne as the business recovered during the quarter.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q1 2020 NAV falls to $2.88/share on oil crash and COVID-19 impact
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q1 2020 NAV per share declined to $2.88 from $3.40, primarily due to the collapse of crude oil prices and Equus Energy value reduction amid COVID-19.

items.title: 8-K — Submission of Matters to a Vote · Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus reports results of its 2020 annual shareholder meeting
items.snippet: Equus Total Return announced the results of its annual meeting of stockholders held in May 2020.

items.title: 8-K — Other Events · Financial Statements and Exhibits
items.headline_ai: Equus Q4 2019 NAV falls to $3.40/share on Equus Energy decline
items.snippet: Equus Total Return Q4 2019 NAV per share declined to $3.40 from $3.63, driven by a decrease in the fair value of Equus Energy due to lower commodity prices.
